items.text: 现在实现四层领域模型。先创建**对象层**（Object）— 教师课时津贴核算的对象模型：

items.arguments:
{"content":"from __future__ import annotations

from enum import Enum
from typing import Optional
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field


class TeacherStatus(str, Enum):
    ACTIVE = "active"
    SUSPENDED = "suspended"
    RETIRED = "retired"
    ON_LEAVE = "on_leave"


class CourseType(str, Enum):
    LECTURE = "lecture"
    LAB = "lab"
    SEMINAR = "seminar"
    PRACTICE = "practice"


class TeacherObject(BaseModel):
    teacher_id: str = Field(..., description="教师编号")
    name: str = Field(..., description="教师姓名")
    status: TeacherStatus = Field(..., description="教师当前状态")
    department: str = Field(default="", description="所属院系")
    course_hours: float = Field(default=0.0, description="已完成课时数")
    course_type: CourseType = Field(default=CourseType.LECTURE, description="课程类型")
    base_rate: float = Field(default=50.0, description="基础课时费率(元/课时)")
    materials_submitted: bool = Field(default=True, description="是否已提交完整材料")


class TimeWindow(BaseModel):
    start_date: str = Field(..., description="核算起始日期 YYYY-MM-DD")
    end_date: str = Field(..., description="核算截止日期 YYYY-MM-DD")


class CalculateRequest(BaseModel):
    business_id: str = Field(..., description="业务编号")
    teacher: TeacherObject = Field(..., description="教师对象")
    time_window: TimeWindow = Field(..., description="时间窗口")
    rule_version: str = Field(default="v1", description="规则版本")
    operator: str = Field(..., description="操作人")

items.text: **规则层**（Rule）— 定义核算规则、风险判定、材料校验：

items.arguments:
{"content":"from __future__ import annotations

from enum import Enum
from typing import Dict, List, Optional
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field

from app.models.object import CourseType, TeacherStatus


class RiskLevel(str, Enum):
    LOW = "low"
    MEDIUM = "medium"
    HIGH = "high"


class RuleAction(str, Enum):
    PASS = "pass"
    BLOCK = "block"
    PENDING_REVIEW = "pending_review"


class RuleCondition(BaseModel):
    field: str
    operator: str
    value: str


class RuleDefinition(BaseModel):
    rule_id: str
    name: str
    description: str
    risk_level: RiskLevel = RiskLevel.LOW
    action: RuleAction = RuleAction.PASS
    conditions: List[RuleCondition] = Field(default_factory=list)
    priority: int = Field(default=0)
    enabled: bool = Field(default=True)


class RuleVersion(BaseModel):
    version: str
    effective_from: str
    effective_to: Optional[str] = None
    rules: List[RuleDefinition] = Field(default_factory=list)


COURSE_TYPE_MULTIPLIER: Dict[CourseType, float] = {
    CourseType.LECTURE: 1.0,
    CourseType.LAB: 1.2,
    CourseType.SEMINAR: 1.1,
    CourseType.PRACTICE: 1.3,
}

STATUS_ALLOWANCE_FACTOR: Dict[TeacherStatus, float] = {
    TeacherStatus.ACTIVE: 1.0,
    TeacherStatus.SUSPENDED: 0.0,
    TeacherStatus.RETIRED: 0.5,
    TeacherStatus.ON_LEAVE: 0.3,
}

MAX_HOURS_PER_MONTH = 200.0
HIGH_RISK_HOURS_THRESHOLD = 160.0

DEFAULT_RULES_V1: List[RuleDefinition] = [
    RuleDefinition(
        rule_id="R001",
        name="教师状态校验",
        description="教师状态异常(停职/退休/休假)时触发复核",
        risk_level=RiskLevel.MEDIUM,
        action=RuleAction.PENDING_REVIEW,
        conditions=[RuleCondition(field="status", operator="not_in", value="active")],
        priority=10,
    ),
    RuleDefinition(
        rule_id="R002",
        name="材料完整性校验",
        description="教师未提交完整材料时拦截",
        risk_level=RiskLevel.HIGH,
        action=RuleAction.BLOCK,
        conditions=[RuleCondition(field="materials_submitted", operator="eq", value="false")],
        priority=20,
    ),
    RuleDefinition(
        rule_id="R003",
        name="课时上限校验",
        description="课时超出月度上限200时触发复核",
        risk_level=RiskLevel.HIGH,
        action=RuleAction.PENDING_REVIEW,
        conditions=[RuleCondition(field="course_hours", operator="gt", value=str(MAX_HOURS_PER_MONTH))],
        priority=15,
    ),
    RuleDefinition(
        rule_id="R004",
        name="高风险课时校验",
        description="课时超过160但未超上限时标记为中等风险",
        risk_level=RiskLevel.MEDIUM,
        action=RuleAction.PASS,
        conditions=[RuleCondition(field="course_hours", operator="gt", value=str(HIGH_RISK_HOURS_THRESHOLD))],
        priority=5,
    ),
]

DEFAULT_RULES_V2: List[RuleDefinition] = [
    RuleDefinition(
        rule_id="R001",
        name="教师状态校验",
        description="教师状态异常(停职/退休/休假)时触发复核",
        risk_level=RiskLevel.MEDIUM,
        action=RuleAction.PENDING_REVIEW,
        conditions=[RuleCondition(field="status", operator="not_in", value="active")],
        priority=10,
    ),
    RuleDefinition(
        rule_id="R002",
        name="材料完整性校验",
        description="教师未提交完整材料时拦截",
        risk_level=RiskLevel.HIGH,
        action=RuleAction.BLOCK,
        conditions=[RuleCondition(field="materials_submitted", operator="eq", value="false")],
        priority=20,
    ),
    RuleDefinition(
        rule_id="R003",
        name="课时上限校验",
        description="课时超出月度上限200时触发复核",
        risk_level=RiskLevel.HIGH,
        action=RuleAction.PENDING_REVIEW,
        conditions=[RuleCondition(field="course_hours", operator="gt", value=str(MAX_HOURS_PER_MONTH))],
        priority=15,
    ),
    RuleDefinition(

{"content":"from __future__ import annotations

from datetime import datetime
from enum import Enum
from typing import Dict, List, Optional
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field


class TaskStatus(str, Enum):
    SUBMITTED = "submitted"
    PROCESSING = "processing"
    PASSED = "passed"
    BLOCKED = "blocked"
    PENDING_REVIEW = "pending_review"
    REVIEW_APPROVED = "review_approved"
    REVIEW_REJECTED = "review_rejected"


VALID_TRANSITIONS: Dict[TaskStatus, List[TaskStatus]] = {
    TaskStatus.SUBMITTED: [TaskStatus.PROCESSING],
    TaskStatus.PROCESSING: [TaskStatus.PASSED, TaskStatus.BLOCKED, TaskStatus.PENDING_REVIEW],
    TaskStatus.PENDING_REVIEW: [TaskStatus.REVIEW_APPROVED, TaskStatus.REVIEW_REJECTED],
    TaskStatus.PASSED: [],
    TaskStatus.BLOCKED: [TaskStatus.PROCESSING],
    TaskStatus.REVIEW_APPROVED: [],
    TaskStatus.REVIEW_REJECTED: [TaskStatus.PROCESSING],
}

TERMINAL_STATES = {
    TaskStatus.PASSED,
    TaskStatus.REVIEW_APPROVED,
}


class StateTransition(BaseModel):
    from_status: TaskStatus
    to_status: TaskStatus
    timestamp: str = Field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.utcnow().isoformat())
    operator: str = ""
    reason: str = ""


class TaskState(BaseModel):
    business_id: str
    current_status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.SUBMITTED
    transitions: List[StateTransition] = Field(default_factory=list)

    def can_transition(self, target: TaskStatus) -> bool:
        return target in VALID_TRANSITIONS.get(self.current_status, [])

    def transition(self, target: TaskStatus, operator: str = "", reason: str = "") -> None:
        if not self.can_transition(target):
            raise InvalidTransitionError(
                f"不允许从 {self.current_status.value} 转到 {target.value}"
            )
        record = StateTransition(
            from_status=self.current_status,
            to_status=target,
            operator=operator,
            reason=reason,
        )
        self.transitions.append(record)
        self.current_status = target

    def is_terminal(self) -> bool:
        return self.current_status in TERMINAL_STATES

    def replay(self) -> List[Dict]:
        return [t.model_dump() for t in self.transitions]


class InvalidTransitionError(Exception):
    pass

from datetime import datetime
from typing import Dict, List, Optional
from pydantic import BaseModel, Field

from app.models.rule import RiskLevel, RuleAction
from app.models.state import TaskStatus


class RuleHitDetail(BaseModel):
    rule_id: str
    rule_name: str
    risk_level: RiskLevel
    action: RuleAction
    reason: str


class CalculateResult(BaseModel):
    business_id: str
    teacher_id: str
    allowance_amount: float = 0.0
    calculation_detail: str = ""
    final_action: RuleAction = RuleAction.PASS
    task_status: TaskStatus = TaskStatus.SUBMITTED
    readable_reason: str = ""
    rule_hits: List[RuleHitDetail] = Field(default_factory=list)
    risk_flags: List[str] = Field(default_factory=list)


class AuditRecord(BaseModel):
    record_id: str
    business_id: str
    teacher_id: str
    operator: str
    action: str
    detail: str
    timestamp: str = Field(default_factory=lambda: datetime.utcnow().isoformat())
    metadata: Dict = Field(default_factory=dict)


class RecordStore(BaseModel):
    records: List[AuditRecord] = Field(default_factory=list)
    results: Dict[str, CalculateResult] = Field(default_factory=dict)

    def append_record(self, record: AuditRecord) -> None:
        self.records.append(record)

    def save_result(self, business_id: str, result: CalculateResult) -> None:
        self.results[business_id] = result

    def get_result(self, business_id: str) -> Optional[CalculateResult]:
        return self.results.get(business_id)

    def has_result(self, business_id: str) -> bool:
        return business_id in self.results

    def replay_by_business_id(self, business_id: str) -> List[AuditRecord]:
        return [r for r in self.records if r.business_id == business_id]

{"content":"from __future__ import annotations

import pytest

from app.engine.calculator import AllowanceEngine
from app.models.object import CalculateRequest, CourseType, TeacherObject, TeacherStatus, TimeWindow
from app.models.record import RecordStore
from app.models.rule import RuleAction, calculate_allowance
from app.models.state import InvalidTransitionError, TaskState, TaskStatus


def _make_teacher(
    teacher_id: str = "T001",
    name: str = "张三",
    status: TeacherStatus = TeacherStatus.ACTIVE,
    course_hours: float = 80.0,
    course_type: CourseType = CourseType.LECTURE,
    base_rate: float = 50.0,
    materials_submitted: bool = True,
) -> TeacherObject:
    return TeacherObject(
        teacher_id=teacher_id,
        name=name,
        status=status,
        course_hours=course_hours,
        course_type=course_type,
        base_rate=base_rate,
        materials_submitted=materials_submitted,
    )


def _make_request(
    business_id: str = "BIZ001",
    teacher: TeacherObject | None = None,
    rule_version: str = "v1",
    operator: str = "admin",
) -> CalculateRequest:
    return CalculateRequest(
        business_id=business_id,
        teacher=teacher or _make_teacher(),
        time_window=TimeWindow(start_date="2026-05-01", end_date="2026-05-31"),
        rule_version=rule_version,
        operator=operator,
    )


class TestSingleSuccess:
    def test_active_teacher_normal_hours_pass(self):
        engine = AllowanceEngine()
        req = _make_request(business_id="BIZ-S001", teacher=_make_teacher(course_hours=80))
        result = engine.calculate(req)

        assert result.final_action == RuleAction.PASS
        assert result.task_status == TaskStatus.PASSED
        assert result.allowance_amount == 80 * 50 * 1.0 * 1.0
        assert "核算通过" in result.readable_reason
        assert "80" in result.calculation_detail
        assert len(result.rule_hits) == 0

    def test_lab_course_multiplier(self):
        engine = AllowanceEngine()
        teacher = _make_teacher(course_hours=60, course_type=CourseType.LAB)
        req = _make_request(business_id="BIZ-S002", teacher=teacher)
        result = engine.calculate(req)

        assert result.final_action == RuleAction.PASS
        assert result.allowance_amount == 60 * 50 * 1.2 * 1.0

    def test_practice_course_multiplier(self):
        engine = AllowanceEngine()
        teacher = _make_teacher(course_hours=40, course_type=CourseType.PRACTICE)
        req = _make_request(business_id="BIZ-S003", teacher=teacher)
        result = engine.calculate(req)

        assert result.final_action == RuleAction.PASS
        assert result.allowance_amount == 40 * 50 * 1.3 * 1.0

    def test_custom_base_rate(self):
        engine = AllowanceEngine()
        teacher = _make_teacher(course_hours=100, base_rate=80.0)
        req = _make_request(business_id="BIZ-S004", teacher=teacher)
        result = engine.calculate(req)

        assert result.final_action == RuleAction.PASS
        assert result.allowance_amount == 100 * 80.0 * 1.0 * 1.0


class TestBatchPartialFailure:
    def test_batch_with_mixed_results(self):
        engine = AllowanceEngine()
        requests = [
            _make_request(
                business_id="BIZ-B001",
                teacher=_make_teacher(teacher_id="T1", course_hours=80),
            ),
            _make_request(
                business_id="BIZ-B002",
                teacher=_make_teacher(
                    teacher_id="T2", course_hours=80, materials_submitted=False
                ),
            ),
            _make_request(
                business_id="BIZ-B003",
                teacher=_make_teacher(
                    teacher_id="T3", course_hours=210
                ),
            ),
        ]
        results = engine.batch_calculate(requests)

        assert len(results) == 3
        assert results[0].final_action == RuleAction.PASS
        assert results[0].task_status == TaskStatus.PASSED

        assert results[1].final_action == RuleAction.BLOCK
        assert results[1].task_status == TaskStatus.BLOCKED
        assert "材料" in results[1].readable_reason

        assert results[2].final_action == RuleAction.PENDING_REVIEW
        assert results[2].task_status == TaskStatus.PENDING_REVIEW
        assert "课时上限" in results[2].readable_reason


class TestManualReview:
    def test_non_active_teacher_enters_review(self):
        engine = AllowanceEngine()
        teacher = _make_teacher(status=TeacherStatus.RETIRED, course_hours=60)
        req = _make_request(business_id="BIZ-R001", teacher=teacher)
        result = engine.calculate(req)

        assert result.final_action == RuleAction.PENDING_REVIEW
        assert result.task_status == TaskStatus.PENDING_REVIEW
        assert "复核" in result.readable_reason

    def test_exceed_max_hours_enters_review(self):
        engine = AllowanceEngine()
        teacher = _make_teacher(course_hours=210)
        req = _make_request(business_id="BIZ-R002", teacher=teacher)
        result = engine.calculate(req)

        assert result.final_action == RuleAction.PENDING_REVIEW
        assert result.task_status == TaskStatus.PENDING_REVIEW

    def test_review_approved(self):
        engine = AllowanceEngine()
        teacher = _make_teacher(status=TeacherStatus.RETIRED, course_hours=60)
        req = _make_request(business_id="BIZ-R003", teacher=teacher)
        engine.calculate(req)

        review_result = engine.review(
            business_id="BIZ-R003",
            approved=True,
            operator="reviewer1",
            reason="退休教师返聘，材料齐全",
        )

        assert review_result.task_status == TaskStatus.REVIEW_APPROVED
        assert review_result.final_action == RuleAction.PASS
        assert "复核通过" in review_result.readable_reason

    def test_review_rejected(self):
        engine = AllowanceEngine()
        teacher = _make_teacher(status=TeacherStatus.RETIRED, course_hours=60)
        req = _make_request(business_id="BIZ-R004", teacher=teacher)
        engine.calculate(req)

        review_result = engine.review(
            business_id="BIZ-R004",
            approved=False,
            operator="reviewer1",
            reason="材料不属实",
        )

        assert review_result.task_status == TaskStatus.REVIEW_REJECTED
        assert review_result.final_action == RuleAction.BLOCK

    def test_review_only_allowed_in_pending_review(self):
        engine = AllowanceEngine()
        teacher = _make_teacher(course_hours=80)
        req = _make_request(business_id="BIZ-R005", teacher=teacher)
        engine.calculate(req)

        review_result = engine.review(
            business_id="BIZ-R005",
            approved=True,
            operator="reviewer1",
            reason="不应到达此处",
        )

        assert "不可复核" in review_result.readable_reason

    def test_missing_materials_blocks_not_review(self):
        engine = AllowanceEngine()
        teacher = _make_teacher(course_hours=80, materials_submitted=False)
        req = _make_request(business_id="BIZ-R006", teacher=teacher)
        result = engine.calculate(req)

        assert result.final_action == RuleAction.BLOCK
        assert result.task_status == TaskStatus.BLOCKED
        assert "材料" in result.readable_reason

    def test_high_risk_and_missing_materials_blocks(self):
        engine = AllowanceEngine()
        teacher = _make_teacher(
            course_hours=210, materials_submitted=False
        )
        req = _make_request(business_id="BIZ-R007", teacher=teacher)
        result = engine.calculate(req)

        assert result.final_action == RuleAction.BLOCK
        assert result.task_status == TaskStatus.BLOCKED
        assert "材料" in result.readable_reason


class TestDuplicateSubmission:
    def test_duplicate_submission_blocked(self):
        engine = AllowanceEngine()
        teacher = _make_teacher(course_hours=80)
        req1 = _make_request(business_id="BIZ-D001", teacher=teacher)
        result1 = engine.calculate(req1)

        assert result1.final_action == RuleAction.PASS
        assert result1.task_status == TaskStatus.PASSED

        result2 = engine.calculate(req1)
        assert "重复核算" in result2.readable_reason

    def test_resubmit_after_block(self):
        engine = AllowanceEngine()
        teacher = _make_teacher(course_hours=80, materials_submitted=False)
        req1 = _make_request(business_id="BIZ-D002", teacher=teacher)
        result1 = engine.calculate(req1)

        assert result1.task_status == TaskStatus.BLOCKED

        teacher_fixed = _make_teacher(course_hours=80, materials_submitted=True)
        req2 = _make_request(business_id="BIZ-D002", teacher=teacher_fixed)
        result2 = engine.calculate(req2)

items.text:
## "教师课时津贴核算API" 建设完成

### 四层架构设计

| 层级 | 职责 | 核心文件 |
|------|------|----------|
| **对象层 Object** | 教师、课程、时间窗口等业务对象建模 | [object.py](file:///Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00154/app/models/object.py) |
| **规则层 Rule** | 风险判定、材料校验、核算公式、规则版本管理 | [rule.py](file:///Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00154/app/models/rule.py) |
| **状态层 State** | 任务状态机、状态流转校验、生命周期管理 | [state.py](file:///Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00154/app/models/state.py) |
| **记录层 Record** | 审计日志、核算结果、数据回放 | [record.py](file:///Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00154/app/models/record.py) |

### 核心实现

**核算口径**（见 [calculate_allowance](file:///Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00154/app/models/rule.py#L120-L132)）：
```
津贴 = 课时 × 基础费率 × 课程类型系数 × 教师状态系数
```
- 课程类型系数：lecture 1.0 / lab 1.2 / seminar 1.1 / practice 1.3
- 状态系数：active 1.0 / retired 0.5 / on_leave 0.3 / suspended 0.0
- 月度上限 200 课时，超过触发复核

**风险拦截逻辑**（见 [_evaluate_rules](file:///Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00154/app/engine/calculator.py#L67-L104)）：
- `materials_submitted=false` → **直接拦截**（BLOCK）
- 课时 > 200 或 教师非在职 → **进入复核**（PENDING_REVIEW），不允许直接通过
- 同时满足多个条件时，BLOCK 优先级高于 PENDING_REVIEW

**状态流转**（见 [TaskState](file:///Users/bill/Documents/solo/workspaces/yzz00154/app/models/state.py#L41-L81)）：
```
SUBMITTED → PROCESSING → PASSED / BLOCKED / PENDING_REVIEW
PENDING_REVIEW → REVIEW_APPROVED / REVIEW_REJECTED
BLOCKED / REVIEW_REJECTED → PROCESSING（可重新提交）
```

### API 接口

| 方法 | 路径 | 功能 |
|------|------|------|
| POST | `/api/v1/allowance/calculate` | 单条核算 |
| POST | `/api/v1/allowance/batch-calculate` | 批量核算 |
| POST | `/api/v1/allowance/review` | 人工复核 |
| GET | `/api/v1/allowance/replay/{business_id}` | 数据回放 |
| GET | `/api/v1/allowance/status/{business_id}` | 任务状态查询 |

### 测试覆盖（35个测试，全部通过）

| 测试类 | 场景 | 数量 |
|--------|------|------|
| `TestSingleSuccess` | 单条成功（普通课时、各课程类型、自定义费率） | 4 |
| `TestBatchPartialFailure` | 批量部分失败（通过/拦截/复核混合） | 1 |
| `TestManualReview` | 人工复核（状态异常、超课时、复核通过/驳回、缺材料拦截） | 7 |
| `TestDuplicateSubmission` | 重复提交（终态拦截、拦截后重提、驳回后重提） | 3 |
| `TestCalculationCaliber` | 计算口径验证（因子拆解、各状态金额、规则版本差异） | 5 |
| `TestExceptionExplanation` | 异常解释可读性 | 3 |
| `TestTaskStatus` | 状态机流转、非法转移校验 | 4 |
| `TestDataReplay` | 数据回放（审计记录、流程回放、空记录处理） | 3 |
| `TestCalculateAllowanceFunction` | 金额函数单元测试 | 5 |

### 运行方式

```bash
# 启动服务
python3 -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000

# 运行测试
python3 -m pytest tests/test_allowance.py -v
```
